producer: demiurge RTSC M471 — hexa-rtsc n=6 RT-SC family slot predicted-hydride import. Carries the Mk.I path-3 PREDICTED-NOT-MEASURED hydride: (Y,Ca)H₆ at 185 GPa, Tc=210 K (claim). This sits *between* the 4 measured Mk.I hydrides (H₃S/LaH₁₀/CaH₆/ThH₁₀ — measured, NOT in this slot) and the Mk.II ambient claim (n6_mk2_lcyscH24). Included in claim-only n=6 import because it is the ONE Mk.I path that has been PREDICTED (algebraically on the n=6 lattice) but never measured — therefore empirically-unproven, even though it would not satisfy ambient-pressure RT-SC if measured.
stub_note: Schema record for an ALGEBRAICALLY PREDICTED hydride that has never been synthesized or measured. The (Y,Ca)H₆ stoichiometry is a Mk.I 6-P-T-path prediction (hexa-rtsc paper line 569), distinct from the measured CaH₆ (Ma 2022, Tc=215 K @ 172 GPa) — adding Y to the cation lattice is the hexa-rtsc claim-only modification. Tc=210 K is a *predicted target*, not a measurement.
source: hexa-rtsc-derived (Mk.I P-T path 3 prediction on n=6 lattice)
source_note: `hexa-rtsc-derived` here describes lineage (n=6 lattice Mk.I path 3). gate_type=empirically-unproven is the SCHEMA gate — predicted-not-measured. Distinct from the measured CaH₆ (Tc=215 K @ 172 GPa, Ma 2022 — a real measurement, NOT claim-only) and distinct from the PR #90 hexa-rtsc-DERIVED REBCO baseline (sim-derived numbers for a measured family).

spec.family_enum_note: ConductorMaterial = cu | nbti | nb3sn | rebco | bi2212 | rtsc_hypothetical. (Y,Ca)H₆ predicted = rtsc_hypothetical (claim-only). Note: the *measured* CaH₆ would be `hydride` family in a different schema row; this record is the hexa-rtsc Y-substituted claim-only variant.
spec.compound_stoichiometry_note: Y-substituted CaH₆ clathrate-like hydride. H stoichiometry 6 = n. Cation substitution (Y for Ca) is the hexa-rtsc claim-only modification on the measured Ma 2022 CaH₆ host lattice.
spec.tc_k_note: CLAIM ONLY — Mk.I predicted Tc=210 K (hexa-rtsc paper line 569: `(Y,Ca)H₆ (185 GPa, Tc=210 K) — predicted`). Not measured. The PREDICTED label in the source paper is explicit — this is exactly what gate_type=empirically-unproven captures.
spec.hc2_t_at_4k_note: Not specified in the Mk.I path-3 prediction — only Tc and pressure are stated.
spec.pressure_gpa_note: CLAIM ONLY — predicted at 185 GPa (HIGH pressure, NOT ambient). Even if measured at 210 K @ 185 GPa, it would NOT satisfy RTSC.md §8.9 (a) ambient-pressure criterion of `진짜 RTSC`. Included in M471 import because it is empirically-UNPROVEN (predicted-not-measured), which is precisely the gate_type=empirically-unproven semantic — distinct from RT-SC-at-ambient which is the §8.9 absorbed=true bar.

jc_b_t_theta.description: No Jc(B,T,θ) for an un-synthesized predicted hydride.

dft_corpus_status.mp_cache: unknown (Y,Ca-H clathrate not standard MP entry; may need OPTIMADE query)
dft_corpus_status.note: Unlike (La,Ce,Y,Sc)H₂₄ which is honestly absent from all DFT corpora, (Y,Ca)H₆ as a Y-substituted variant of measured CaH₆ MIGHT have partial DFT coverage via the parent CaH₆ structure. Status left `unknown` honestly; not probed for this import.

provenance.source_citation: hexa-rtsc/papers/n6-ultimate-superconductor-integrated-paper.md §6 Mk.I roadmap (line 569 path 3: `(Y,Ca)H₆ (185 GPa, Tc=210 K) — predicted`). Distinct from the measured Mk.I paths: H₃S (Drozdov 2015, Tc=203 K @ 200 GPa), LaH₁₀ (Somayazulu 2019, Tc=250 K @ 170 GPa), CaH₆ (Ma 2022, Tc=215 K @ 172 GPa), ThH₁₀ (Semenok 2021, Tc=161 K @ 100 GPa) — those 4 are measured and do NOT belong in this claim-only slot.
provenance.derive_chain: hexa-rtsc n=6 lattice Mk.I 6-P-T-path roadmap -> path 3 (Y for Ca cation substitution on measured CaH₆ host) -> predicted Tc=210 K @ 185 GPa -> this conductor claim-only record. No DFT, no synthesis, no measurement of the Y-substituted variant.

absorbed_invariant_note: absorbed=false PERMANENT until a synthesis route + measurement triad lands. Even a successful 210 K @ 185 GPa measurement would only flip the *hydride family* row (not this claim-only RT-SC slot) — RT-SC absorbed=true per §8.9 (a) requires ambient pressure.
gate_type_enum_note: gate_type=empirically-unproven (NOT hexa-rtsc-derived). The compound is PREDICTED on the n=6 lattice but has never been synthesized or measured. Distinct from PR #90's gate_type=hexa-rtsc-derived (which is for SIMULATION-derived REBCO numbers grounded in BCS lineage for a measured family) — here the family itself is unmeasured.
scope_caveats: claim-only — algebraic / lattice-derived (n=6); predicted but never synthesized, never measured; never `absorbed=true` until measured (RTSC.md §8.8 invariant + §8.9 5-gate matrix).

Compound (Y,Ca)H₆ is the Y-substituted variant of measured CaH₆ (Ma 2022). The substitution itself is the hexa-rtsc claim-only modification — the parent CaH₆ is measured, the Y-substituted variant is not.

Tc=210 K is a PREDICTION (hexa-rtsc paper line 569 explicitly labels it `predicted`); 185 GPa is HIGH pressure, NOT ambient. Even successful measurement at these conditions would not satisfy §8.9 (a) `진짜 RTSC` ambient-pressure criterion.

Included in M471 import to be HONEST about what `hexa-rtsc n=6 candidate` covers — not just the ambient RT-SC claim (n6_mk2_lcyscH24) but also the high-pressure predicted-but-unmeasured candidates in the 6-P-T roadmap. Both are empirically-unproven, just with different gate-distance to absorbed=true.
demiurge MUST NOT use this record as conductor input to a real device producer.

If a future synthesis + measurement at 185 GPa lands ≥3 independent labs, a NEW record (gate_type=measurement-replicated, family transitions toward `hydride` row in §8.2) supersedes this slot — but RT-SC absorbed=true still requires the ambient-pressure variant.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · provisional=true · gate_type=empirically-unproven · domain=conductor · family=rtsc_hypothetical. R4 preserved — predicted hydride is not a measurement and not a device input.
citations: RTSC.md §8.2 / §8.5 / §8.6 (family matrix · handoff schema · ConductorMaterial enum · gate_type semantics)
